title: Alarm Clock, Silent Bedside Non Ticking Alarm Clocks Table Bedside Clock Battery Powered Large Display Snooze Light Clocks for Heavy Sleepers Bedrooms Office Travel (White)
features: ⏰ Silent Alarm Clocks & No Ticking: The alarm clocks bedside adopt a premium mute movement, with the pointer scanning silently and running in silence. Say goodbye to the ticking noise and enjoy a quiet and comfortable sleep！
⏰ Night Light: Press the "SNOOZE/LIGHT" button on the top and the soft light will come on, not dazzling and saving power. You can quickly read time in the dark without having to turn on the light

⏰ Snooze Alarm Clock: When the alarm clocks rings, press the "SNOOZE/LIGHT" button on the top, the bell will pause and ring again after 5 minutes. The bedside clock will ring every 5 minutes until you turn it off. The volume of the clocks will gradually increase, and it will not suddenly wake you up, nor will it harm your eardrums and health

⏰ Large Display & Easy to Read: The large numbers on the dial are clearly visible, making it easy for adults to read time and use. The compact size of the clocks for bedrooms is suitable for placing on the bedside table, living room, kitchen, dormitory, office and any other place you like

⏰ Long-Lasting: The alarm clock is powered by 1 * AA batteries (not included). The table alarm clock has accurate timing, easy to load batteries, long battery life and durability. The exquisite small alarm clock is also an ideal present for mothers, fathers, elderly people, students, workers and colleagues. The travel alarm clock is suitable as a surprise for daily present such as birthday present , Mother's Day present , Father's Day present and Christmas present !
description: The Non Ticking and Snoozy Alarm Clock - Enjoy a peaceful sleep & Wake up your morning! ✨ Made of high-quality plastic, precise time and durable. ✨ Non Ticking - ensure you can enjoy a peaceful and comfortable sleep. ✨ SNOOZE/LIGHT: 🍄 Press the "nap/night light" button to easily read the time without dazzling the eye. 🍄 When the alarm clock rings, press the "snooze/glow" button on the top, the bell will pause and ring again in 5 minutes. The alarm clock rings every 5 minutes until you turn it off. The volume of the alarm clock will gradually increase, and it will not suddenly wake you up, nor will it harm your eardrums and health! ✨ Compact - A compact size (3.11 '' x 3.19 '' x 1.66 '' / 7.9 cm x 8.1 cm x 4.2 cm) alarm clock is suitable for decoration and use in bedside tables, living rooms, kitchens, dormitories, offices, and other places. ✨ Easy to Use - Attached is a manual, please follow the instructions to operate and use, very simple. ✔✔ 【How to Set Alarm】: Rotate the alarm knob, adjust the red needle in the alarm clock to your desired alarm time and turn the alarm switch to "ON" 🎁 Package includes: 1x Alarm Clock (White) 1x Instructions 📍 Notes: 1. Please use high-quality carbon batteries instead of strong alkaline or rechargeable batteries to extend the service life of the movement. 2. Due to manual measurement, the size and weight may have a certain error.
